cohorts.name: tenure_bucket
cohorts.purpose: Feeds the ordinal `tenure_segment` feature in Stage 3.2.

plot.caption: Churn rate per bucket of tenure_months. Orange dashed = overall rate (16.8%). Red dotted = 2.0× hotspot threshold. Red bars have cleared the hotspot line — candidate segments for a binary flag in Stage 3.2.

cohorts.name: city_tier
cohorts.purpose: Tier-1/2/3 cities often have different churn dynamics.

plot.caption: Churn rate per bucket of city_tier. Orange dashed = overall rate (16.8%). Red dotted = 2.0× hotspot threshold. Red bars have cleared the hotspot line — candidate segments for a binary flag in Stage 3.2.

cohorts.name: preferred_payment_mode
cohorts.purpose: COD users are a known higher-churn segment.

plot.caption: Churn rate per bucket of preferred_payment_mode. Orange dashed = overall rate (16.8%). Red dotted = 2.0× hotspot threshold. Red bars have cleared the hotspot line — candidate segments for a binary flag in Stage 3.2.

narrative: Analysed 3 cohort definition(s). No buckets cleared the hotspot threshold — churn is distributed fairly evenly across the analysed cohorts.

recommendation.rationale: No cohort hotspots identified. No cohort-derived binary flags recommended for Stage 3.2.
